rationale: Both notes indicate a close conceptual and methodological link: the cited paper introduces a two-factor Response-to-Failure scale for sequential self-control, and the citing paper develops a two-factor PLRM for sequential responses after subgoal success with similar incremental predictive-validity claims over existing self-control measures. Given this strong overlap in focal constructs (post-event self-regulation responses), scale-building approach, and behavioral prediction logic, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
